title: Continuous Internal Evaluation (CIE) Process on a Blockchain
description: A flowchart illustrating how student evaluation data is immutably recorded, verified, and accessed on a blockchain, ensuring a transparent and tamper-proof continuous assessment process.
relationships: Educator submits an evaluation/grade which is signed with a private key
The transaction is broadcast to the network and validated by consensus
A smart contract encodes the evaluation rules and triggers upon receiving data
Validated transactions are grouped into a new block and added to the chain
Authorized parties can query the immutable ledger to verify a student's record
